tasks.label: zabbix-smoke
args: import os; os.chdir('backend'); from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; from main import app; c=TestClient(app); l=c.post('/api/v1/auth/login', json={'email':'admin@capdash.io','password':'Admin@123'}); print('login', l.status_code); h={'Authorization': f"Bearer {l.json()['access_token']}"}; r=c.get('/api/v1/platforms/zabbix/hosts?page=1&limit=5', headers=h); print('zabbix_hosts', r.status_code, r.json().get('total'), len(r.json().get('items',[]))); t=c.get('/api/v1/platforms/zabbix/triggers?page=1&limit=5', headers=h); print('zabbix_triggers', t.status_code, t.json().get('total'), len(t.json().get('items',[])))

tasks.label: free-backend-port
args: $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Freed 8000' } else { Write-Output 'No listener on 8000' }

tasks.label: restart-backend-clean
args: $c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($c) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }; Set-Location backend; C:/Users/OnesmusSimiyu/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WindowsApps/python3.12.exe -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000

tasks.label: restart-frontend-clean
args: $c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($c) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }; npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173

tasks.label: restart-backend-single
args: $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($p in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } ; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 }; Set-Location backend; C:/Users/OnesmusSimiyu/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WindowsApps/python3.12.exe -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000

tasks.label: restart-frontend-single
args: $ports = @(5173,5174); foreach ($port in $ports) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($p in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173

tasks.label: stop-5174
args: $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($p in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output 'Stopped 5174' } else { Write-Output 'No listener on 5174' }

tasks.label: restart-backend-after-env
args: $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($p in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700; Set-Location backend; C:/Users/OnesmusSimiyu/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WindowsApps/python3.12.exe -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000

tasks.label: restart-frontend-after-env
args: $ports = @(5173,5174); foreach ($port in $ports) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($p in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700; npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173

tasks.label: kill-8000-all
args: $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($p in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "Killed: $($pids -join ',')" } else { Write-Output 'No listener on 8000' }

tasks.label: kill-backend-8000
args: $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($p in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output ('Killed backend PID(s): ' + ($pids -join ',')) } else { Write-Output 'No backend listener on 8000' }
